parameters.query:
INSERT INTO leads (client_id, lead_name, email, phone, source, metadata, lead_message, created_at)
VALUES (
  '86a01b94-ddab-4594-8afc-8212fb18fdd0',
  '{{ $json.full_name.replace(/''/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.email.replace(/''/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  'bnb_lead_generator',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({company: $json.company, title: $json.title, location: $json.city + ", " + $json.state, apollo_score: $json.score, score_reason: $json.reason, draft_sent: true}).replace(/''/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.lead_message.replace(/''/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
